body:
Hey, just checking in - did you remember to send your weekly status doc to the team today? I know you mentioned Monday was going to be hectic with the 9am sync, and I didn't want it to slip through the cracks again like it did two weeks ago.

Also your manager texted me (yes, Marcus has my number, don't ask) and said he hadn't seen it in the shared folder yet. Maybe worth a quick check?

Love you, talk tonight. - Emma
snippet: Hey, just checking in - did you remember to send your weekly status doc to the t...
subject: Weekly status doc - did you send it?

body:
Ugh, I completely forgot. Just uploaded it now - Marcus should see it in the folder. And of course he has your number, you two bonded at the holiday party over bad opinions about pizza toppings.

Thank you for the reminder, genuinely. I need to just set a recurring alarm for Friday afternoons because this keeps happening. Or maybe bribe you to be my personal assistant permanently.

See you tonight. - Ryan
snippet: Ugh, I completely forgot. Just uploaded it now - Marcus should see it in the fol...
subject: Re: Weekly status doc - did you send it?

body:
Hey babe, are you free for lunch today? I was thinking we could try that new ramen place on Clement Street — the one we walked by last weekend. Around noon or 12:30?

Let me know if work is too crazy. We can always do it another day.

Emma
snippet: Hey babe, are you free for lunch today? I was thinking we could try that new ram...
subject: Lunch today?

body:
Yes! I've been wanting to try that place. 12:30 works better for me, I have a standup at 11:45 that usually runs a few minutes over.

Should I just meet you there or do you want to walk over together from your place?

Ryan
snippet: Yes! I've been wanting to try that place. 12:30 works better for me, I have a st...
subject: Re: Lunch today?

body:
Meet me there — I have an errand to run on that side of town anyway so the timing works out perfectly. I'll grab us a spot if I get there first.

See you at 12:30!

Emma
snippet: Meet me there — I have an errand to run on that side of town anyway so the timin...
subject: Re: Lunch today?

body:
Hey, just got a notification that our Netflix subscription renews in 3 days and it's going up to $22.99 a month now. I know we talked about cutting back on subscriptions before the wedding — do you want to keep it or cancel and just share your mom's account for a while? Let me know what you think before it auto-renews.

Emma
snippet: Hey, just got a notification that our Netflix subscription renews in 3 days and ...
subject: Streaming service renewal

body:
Honestly I think we should keep it. We use it pretty much every night and $23 isn't that bad split between us. Canceling and mooching off my mom's account feels like more hassle than it's worth — she already complained last time we were both logged in during the game.

I'll go ahead and leave the renewal as-is unless you feel strongly. We can revisit after the honeymoon when we do the full subscription audit you mentioned.

Ryan
snippet: Honestly I think we should keep it. We use it pretty much every night and $23 is...
subject: Re: Streaming service renewal
